**Protocol**
Command: SOCKETServer:PROTOCol

**FORMat**
Command: TRIGger:A:BUS:ETHERnet:IPHeader:PROTOcol:FORMat
Description: This command specifies the data format (binary or hex) of the bit pattern to use when triggering on the Ethernet IPv4 header proto

**VALue**
Command: TRIGger:A:BUS:ETHERnet:IPHeader:PROTOcol:VALue
Description: This command specifies the 8-bit binary value to use when triggering on the Ethernet IPv4 header protocol field. The default is all
